items.title: Elliot Anderson a doubt for Panama clash with injury issue hours after England star’s £116m transfer to Man City agreed
items.summary: ELLIOT ANDERSON is a doubt for England's final group stage game against Panama on Saturday. The Three Lions face Panama as they look to secure their spot at the top of Group L. But they may have to do it without Anderson, who may be rested due to muscle soreness. The Nottingham Forest star -...

items.title: Tuchel warns England they face back SEVEN vs Panama and doesn’t have recipe for breaking down teams who park the bus
items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL accepts he has yet to find the “recipe” for breaking down teams who ‘park the bus’. England face Panama — who Tuchel warns could play a BACK SEVEN — in tonight’s final Group L game, just four days after the frustrating goalless draw against Ghana. items.title: Tuchel: Saka pain free and ready to start against Panama
items.summary: England boss Thomas Tuchel says Bukayo Saka is "free of pain" and "ready to go" for the Three Lions' final group game with Panama - amid an injury blow to defender Reece James.

items.title: Sri Lanka keep Women's T20 World Cup semi-finals hopes alive with Scotland win
items.summary: Sri Lanka kept alive their slim hopes of making the Women's T20 World Cup semi-finals for the first time after a dramatic last-over win over Scotland at Old Trafford.

items.title: England latest: Anderson and Rice available but James out, says Tuchel

items.summary: Sensible choice or wrong decision? Norway leave Erling Haaland out as they make 10 changes against France - and lose heavily.

items.title: Tuchel defends full-back selection after James injury
items.summary: Thomas Tuchel defends his full-back selections after confirming Reece James will miss the match against Panama through injury.

items.title: ‘Can’t go too far’ – Kyle Walker loving Jude Bellingham’s edge but fears England talisman runs risk of getting sent off
items.summary: I SEE a lot of chatter about Jude Bellingham and whether he’s running the risk of getting sent off. items.title: Hollywood A-lister looks unrecognisable dressed as Erling Haaland in crowd with Norway fans for France World Cup clash
items.summary: A HOLLYWOOD superstar dressed up like Erling Haaland as he partied with Norway fans for their World Cup clash against France. items.title: ‘Disgusting’ – Yobs shout during moment of silence for Venezuela earthquake victims in Uruguay vs Spain World Cup clash
items.summary: FOOTBALL yobs interrupted a one-minute silence for Venezuela earthquake victims by shouting ahead of Uruguay's World Cup clash against Spain.
